member.office_address: 2348 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0551

form_analysis.form_header_text: FY27 Appropriations Requests - Office of Congresswoman Sara Jacobs (CA-51)
form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
Use this form to submit FY27 Appropriations programmatic and language requests to Congresswoman Jacobs' office. The deadline to submit a request is March 9, 2026 at 6pm Pacific.

Please submit a separate form for each programmatic or language request. Submissions including multiple requests will not be considered. 

As a reminder, this is not the form for Community Project Funding (CPF) requests. Those requests can be submitted here.

sections.description: Details about the person and organization submitting the request.

fields.label: Full address (street address, city, state, zip)
Describe your organization's ties to California's 51st District:
fields.help_text: Briefly explain the connection between the requesting organization and the 51st Congressional District of California.

sections.description: Information regarding the specific appropriations request.

fields.label: Type of request:
fields.rationale: The reference values specify this as a programmatic funding request for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Relevant Appropriations Subcommittee:
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
Transportation, and Housing and Urban Development
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the jurisdiction of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee as confirmed in the reference context.

fields.label: Agency and division/bureau:
fields.rationale: The Agency is NASA and the specific division requested is the Science Mission Directorate as per the provided reference values.

fields.label: Account:
fields.rationale: 'Science' is the specific appropriations account for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Program/Language title:
fields.rationale: This is a programmatic request for the Science Mission Directorate topline.

fields.label: Proposal description (500 words or less):
fields.draft_value:
* Request $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to secure U.S. leadership and maintain competitive parity with China's expanding space capabilities.
* Directly supports CA-51 innovation, where NASA Science has obligated $19.19 million recently to local research and technology leaders.
* Funds critical work at Predictive Science Inc. for solar weather modeling and San Diego State University for community water and wildfire monitoring.
* Sustains high-skill aerospace jobs at local firms like Kratos Sre, Inc., which develops essential thermal protection systems for NASA spacecraft.
fields.rationale: Cites the $9 billion SMD funding goal and the $19.19 million in NASA Science obligations in CA-51. References specific high-value recipients in the district: Predictive Science Inc. (solar modeling), SDSU (wildfire monitoring), and Kratos Sre, Inc. (thermal protection) as documented in the provided context.

fields.label: Bill language (if required):
fields.rationale: The reference context for this programmatic funding request explicitly identifies bill language as 'N/A'.

fields.label: Funding level (if required):
fields.help_text: Enter the specific funding level being requested for FY27.
fields.rationale: The funding ask for NASA's Science Mission Directorate is exactly $9 billion as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Is another Member of Congress leading this request? If so, please name the Member and their office's point of contact:
fields.draft_value: Reps. Don Bacon (R-NE) and Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: Reference values indicate that Reps. Bacon and Chu are leading an existing House letter for this request.

fields.label: Did you meet with a member of Congresswoman Jacobs' staff regarding this request? If so, with who and on what date?
fields.rationale: This requires specific information regarding individual constituent meetings with the Member's staff which is not available in the context.

fields.label: Priority (if submitting more than one request, please rank them):
fields.help_text: If you are submitting multiple requests, indicate how this specific request ranks in priority (e.g., 1 of 3).
fields.rationale: Priority ranking is user-specific and depends on other requests being submitted by the constituent.

top_contracts.description: Bpa call #1 under bpa 80arc023aa001, material property testing of thermal protection systems for science mission directorate missions.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Testing critical thermal protection systems for NASA science spacecraft.

top_grants.description: Dynamcs: a dynamically evolving model of cmes and seps
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Creating predictive models for dangerous solar weather events.

top_grants.description: The solar wind expands outward from the solar corona and fills the heliosphere. It is the medium by which solar-driven space weather phenomena transmit their effects to Earth and the surrounding space environment. Fundamental questions remain about the wind'S origin and acceleration  its connection to smaller-scale dynamical phenomena close to the sun  and the partitioning of the wind into fast and slow streams.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Determining solar wind acceleration mechanisms affecting Earth space weather

top_grants.description: Linking surface magnetic fields to the structure and dynamics of the solar corona
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Researching solar corona dynamics via surface magnetic field links.

top_grants.description: Impacts of changing wildfire regimes on human communities and water security
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Assessing wildfire impacts on community water security.

top_grants.description: Mapping and monitoring coastal wastewater pollution using empirical line method based atmospheric correction and manifold learning-based data fusion
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Mapping and monitoring coastal wastewater pollution sources.
